title: Rui Rui Huoshan Da Taowang

alternative_titles.en: Real and His Friends: The Prologue

synopsis:
This short film is the prologue to "Real and His Friends," about the little monster Real's habitat where the active volcano is about to erupt and Real has to find a way to evacuate his familiar home. From being accustomed to earthquakes to wanting to take away all his beloved objects, Real experienced a painful struggle in her heart. Eventually, with his wisdom and hands, he transformed the cabin into a small boat and embarked on his own adventure at a critical juncture. In this poem-like clip, the simple and lovely Real not only brings us laughter, but also brings us the courage to choose and face new life and new environment.

(Source: Real Wood YouTube Channel)
